ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain used in the experiment */,
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype being measured */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the experiment was conducted */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the test subjects */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age range of the test subjects */,
  "animal_count" INTEGER /* Number of animals used in the experiment */,
  "average_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of average measurement recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of the measurement */,
  "sem" REAL /* Standard error of mean (SEM) */,
  "sd" REAL /* Standard deviation (SD) */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for measurement */,
  "method_duration" REAL /* Duration of the method used for the experiment */,
  "post_insult_time" REAL /* Post insult time value (e.g., recovery time) */,
  "method_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the experimental method */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed environmental conditions */,
  "ethical_approval_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to ethical approval records */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experimental data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_average_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("average_type_id") REFERENCES average_types ("average_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_phenotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("phenotype_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the study objectives */,
  "lead_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the lead investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the study */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date when the study started */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the study was completed */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "ethical_approval_date" TEXT /* Date when ethical approval was obtained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strain characteristics */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the strain */,
  "genetic_modifications" TEXT /* Details of any genetic modifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypes" (
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenotype */,
  "phenotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the phenotype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phenotype characteristics */,
  "measurement_technique" TEXT /* Technique used for measuring the phenotype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method used in experiments */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in the method */,
  "procedure_document" TEXT /* Reference to a detailed procedure document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition under which experiments are conducted */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_types" (
  "average_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average type */,
  "average_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the average type used in measurements */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., mmHg, bpm) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to standard units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
